description: Open-source CRM system built with TypeScript, NestJS, React, and PostgreSQL

Person.description: Represents individual contacts in the CRM system

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when record was last updated

deletedAt.description: Soft delete timestamp (null if not deleted)

name.description: Person's full name (first name, last name)

emails.description: Collection of email addresses (primary and additional)

createdBy.description: Information about who created this record

updatedBy.description: Information about who last updated this record

searchVector.description: Full-text search vector for efficient searching

pointOfContactForOpportunities.description: Opportunities where this person is the point of contact

calendarEventParticipants.description: Calendar events this person participated in

timelineActivities.description: Timeline of activities related to this person

functions.read: Retrieve person records with filters, sorting, and pagination
functions.search: Full-text search across name, emails, phones, and job title
functions.addToOpportunity: Set person as point of contact for opportunity
functions.attachTask: Link task to person via TaskTarget
functions.attachNote: Link note to person via NoteTarget

Company.description: Represents companies/organizations in the CRM system

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when record was last updated

deletedAt.description: Soft delete timestamp (null if not deleted)

annualRecurringRevenue.description: ARR with amount and currency code

address.description: Company address (street, city, state, country, zip)

idealCustomerProfile.description: Whether this company matches ideal customer profile

createdBy.description: Information about who created this record

updatedBy.description: Information about who last updated this record

searchVector.description: Full-text search vector for efficient searching

accountOwner.description: Team member responsible for this account

timelineActivities.description: Timeline of activities related to this company

functions.read: Retrieve company records with filters, sorting, and pagination
functions.search: Full-text search across name and domain
functions.assignAccountOwner: Assign a team member as account owner
functions.addPerson: Add a person to this company
functions.createOpportunity: Create a sales opportunity for this company
functions.attachTask: Link task to company via TaskTarget
functions.attachNote: Link note to company via NoteTarget
functions.getCompanyNameFromDomain: Utility to extract company name from domain

Opportunity.description: Represents sales opportunities/deals in the CRM system

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when record was last updated

deletedAt.description: Soft delete timestamp (null if not deleted)

amount.description: Deal value with amount and currency code

stage.description: Current stage in sales pipeline (e.g., 'New', 'Qualification', 'Proposal', 'Closed Won', 'Closed Lost')

createdBy.description: Information about who created this record

updatedBy.description: Information about who last updated this record

searchVector.description: Full-text search vector for efficient searching

pointOfContact.description: Primary contact person for this opportunity

pointOfContactId.description: Foreign key to point of contact person

owner.description: Team member responsible for this opportunity

timelineActivities.description: Timeline of activities related to this opportunity

functions.read: Retrieve opportunity records with filters, sorting, and pagination
functions.moveStage: Move opportunity to different pipeline stage
functions.assignOwner: Assign a team member as opportunity owner
functions.attachTask: Link task to opportunity via TaskTarget
functions.attachNote: Link note to opportunity via NoteTarget
functions.backfillOwnerField: Migration function to backfill owner field

Task.description: Represents tasks/to-dos in the CRM system

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when record was last updated

deletedAt.description: Soft delete timestamp (null if not deleted)

bodyV2.description: Task description in rich text format

createdBy.description: Information about who created this record

updatedBy.description: Information about who last updated this record

searchVector.description: Full-text search vector for efficient searching

assignee.description: Team member assigned to this task

taskTargets.description: Entities (Person, Company, Opportunity) this task is linked to

timelineActivities.description: Timeline of activities related to this task

functions.read: Retrieve task records with filters, sorting, and pagination
functions.search: Full-text search across title and body
functions.assignTo: Assign task to a team member
functions.linkToEntity: Link task to Person, Company, or Opportunity via TaskTarget
functions.handleTaskTargetsDelete: Post-query hook to cascade delete TaskTargets when task is deleted
functions.handleTaskTargetsRestore: Post-query hook to restore TaskTargets when task is restored
functions.filterByAssignee: Get tasks assigned to specific team member
functions.getOverdueTasks: Retrieve tasks past their due date

Note.description: Represents notes/comments in the CRM system

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when record was last updated

deletedAt.description: Soft delete timestamp (null if not deleted)

bodyV2.description: Note content in rich text format

createdBy.description: Information about who created this record

updatedBy.description: Information about who last updated this record

searchVector.description: Full-text search vector for efficient searching

noteTargets.description: Entities (Person, Company, Opportunity) this note is linked to

timelineActivities.description: Timeline of activities related to this note

functions.read: Retrieve note records with filters, sorting, and pagination
functions.search: Full-text search across title and body
functions.linkToEntity: Link note to Person, Company, or Opportunity via NoteTarget
functions.handleNoteTargetsDelete: Post-query hook to cascade delete NoteTargets when note is deleted
functions.handleNoteTargetsRestore: Post-query hook to restore NoteTargets when note is restored
functions.fixNaNPositionValues: Migration function to fix invalid position values

TaskTarget.description: Junction table linking tasks to various entities (Person, Company, Opportunity, Custom)

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when record was last updated

deletedAt.description: Soft delete timestamp (null if not deleted)

person.description: Person this task is linked to

company.description: Company this task is linked to

opportunity.description: Opportunity this task is linked to

custom.description: Custom entity this task is linked to

functions.softDelete: Soft delete when parent task is deleted
functions.restore: Restore when parent task is restored

NoteTarget.description: Junction table linking notes to various entities (Person, Company, Opportunity, Custom)

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when record was last updated

deletedAt.description: Soft delete timestamp (null if not deleted)

person.description: Person this note is linked to

company.description: Company this note is linked to

opportunity.description: Opportunity this note is linked to

custom.description: Custom entity this note is linked to

functions.softDelete: Soft delete when parent note is deleted
functions.restore: Restore when parent note is restored

Person-Company.description: A person can work for one company; a company can have many people

Person-Opportunity.description: A person can be point of contact for multiple opportunities

Company-Opportunity.description: A company can have multiple opportunities

Person-Task.description: Tasks can be linked to multiple people via TaskTarget junction table

Company-Task.description: Tasks can be linked to multiple companies via TaskTarget junction table

Opportunity-Task.description: Tasks can be linked to multiple opportunities via TaskTarget junction table

Person-Note.description: Notes can be linked to multiple people via NoteTarget junction table

Company-Note.description: Notes can be linked to multiple companies via NoteTarget junction table

Opportunity-Note.description: Notes can be linked to multiple opportunities via NoteTarget junction table

softDelete.description: All entities support soft deletion via deletedAt timestamp
softDelete.implementation: Setting deletedAt to current timestamp instead of hard delete

auditTrail.description: All entities track who created and updated them

fullTextSearch.description: All entities have searchVector field for efficient full-text search

favorites.description: All main entities can be marked as favorites

attachments.description: All main entities support file attachments

timelineActivities.description: All main entities track timeline of activities

positioning.description: All entities have position field for custom ordering
positioning.implementation: Numeric position field for drag-and-drop reordering

contactCreation.description: Automated contact creation from emails and calendar events
features: Find person by primary or additional email
Auto-link person to company based on email domain

taskHooks: handleTaskTargetsDelete - Cascade delete TaskTargets when task is deleted
handleTaskTargetsRestore - Restore TaskTargets when task is restored
noteHooks: handleNoteTargetsDelete - Cascade delete NoteTargets when note is deleted
handleNoteTargetsRestore - Restore NoteTargets when note is restored

participantMatching.description: Match email/calendar participants to existing people

FullNameMetadata.description: Structured name with firstName and lastName

EmailsMetadata.description: Collection of email addresses with primary designation

PhonesMetadata.description: Collection of phone numbers with country codes
PhonesMetadata.structure: Array of {number: string, countryCode: string, isPrimary: boolean}

ActorMetadata.description: Information about who performed an action

RichTextV2Metadata.structure: JSON representation of formatted text blocks

graphql.description: GraphQL API for all CRUD operations
queries: findMany - List records with filtering, sorting, pagination
findOne - Get single record by ID

workspaceIsolation.description: All data is isolated by workspace

caching.description: Redis caching for frequently accessed data
